title: Novam Terram Continuation
description: Just a continuation of Novam Terram for 1.12.2
body:
# Novam Terram Continuation 
This version its a continuation of Novam Terram https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/novam-terram

![test:.](https://i.imgur.com/4IqTGPe.jpg "test:")

Novam Terram Adds Around 90 Biomes In Total (Many Are Just Slight Variations Though Like With Hills Or With Snow) That Should Fit Into Vanilla While Also Being Somewhat Different, The Mod Was Also Inspired By The Highlands Mod & Has Certain Ores Generating More Depending On The Biome Type

# Changes maked in the fork

Changes listed here : https://github.com/quentin452/Novam-Terram-Continuation/wiki

# Discord

Add me on discord :imacatfr

Discord server : https://discord.gg/ZnmHKJzKkZ

# Other

Do it. Add the mod to your modpack.

and yes its compatible with Biomes O Plenty


# Roadmap 


all the roadmap : https://trello.com/b/W5I3Jf78/novam-terram-continuation-roadmap
